title: neptune's currency
description: a currency mod made for the upcoming create : to the moon modpack
body:
neptune's currency is a currency mod specifically made for the create : to the moon modpack which is not released yet but i'm working on it

this mod is currently on beta bugfixes will come soon.

features : 

1000$ bill

500$ bill

200$ bill

100$ bill

50$ bill

20$ bill

10$ bill

5$ bill

1$ bill

0.5$ coin

0.25$ coin


this mod is made for a specific version forge 1.19.2 the version will not be updated however the mod and the contents of the mod itself will be updated.

license : 

feel free to use it on any modpack

curseforge :

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/neptunes-currency
